title: WalletClient trait instead of concrete LightwalletdClient for testability
description: send_payment is generic over C: WalletClient rather than taking &mut LightwalletdClient directly. This is correct: it enables the payment.rs unit tests to use a MockClient without a real gRPC server. A contributor may suggest removing the trait abstraction to simplify the code. Defend it: without WalletClient, payment.rs tests require a live lightwalletd process, making them network-dependent and CI-hostile. The #[allow(async_fn_in_trait)] is appropriate for an internal trait used only in this crate.
close_reason: Design decisions documented in code with defending comments
